540 O0500B_ACTV_ROM_NUM O0500B_ACTV_ROM_NUM O0500B Restorative Nursing: Active Range of Motion Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received active range of motion (ROM) for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
